DEPRECATED_NOTICE: This manifest is SUPERSEDED. The wall-clock canonical numbers below are inflated by host overhead and a cross-host F3 anchor. See v45_1_manifest.json (and v45.2 corrections in same dir) for the corrected event-timed in-corpus values.
corrected_p3_canonical_us_source: v45_1_manifest.json -> anchor.medians_us.P3 (CUDA-event timer, n=700 reps, b21u01)

v45_baseline.csv.reason: wall-clock timer (time.perf_counter) included host overhead; canonical median 57.63 us was inflated by ~17.77 us vs CUDA-event timer
v45_baseline.csv.do_not_use_for: any P3 latency claim; use v45_anchor*.csv instead

v45_paired.csv.reason: wall-clock timer captured max(focal,interferer) GPU time, not focal-only latency; CAS-on-CAS doubling claim was an artifact
v45_paired.csv.do_not_use_for: any contention/paired delta claim; use v45_paired_canonical_event*.csv instead

corrected_conclusion: P3 ATOMIC_CAS_ACQREL on CDNA3 is statistically indistinguishable from F3/N3/O3 within measurement noise; the ordering tax on CDNA3 CAS is at most a few microseconds and is NOT monotonic in fence strength (O3 release-CAS at 36.94 us is faster than M3 relaxed at 37.61 us in the in-corpus event-timed anchor).

new_primitive.name: ATOMIC_CAS_ACQREL
new_primitive.kernel: tl.atomic_add(addr, 0, sem=acq_rel) + tl.atomic_cas(addr, cur, cur+1, sem=acq_rel) sys-scope
new_primitive.distinguishes_from_F3: F3 has acquire-load + acq_rel-CAS; P3 has acq_rel-load + acq_rel-CAS (extra fence on the load side)

baseline.csv_status: SUPERSEDED — do not use for canonical P3 latency
baseline.DEPRECATED_p3_canonical_us_note: wall-clock; superseded by 39.85 us (CUDA-event timer, n=700) — see top-level corrected_p3_canonical_us

paired.csv_status: SUPERSEDED — do not use for paired/contention deltas
paired.DEPRECATED_p3_canonical_per_interferer_u: wall-clock; captured max(focal,interferer) — superseded by event-timed values in v45_1_manifest.json -> paired_canonical_event.per_interferer

DEPRECATED_cas_ordering_ladder_canonical._note: wall-clock + cross-host F3 — see corrected event-timed ladder in v45_1_manifest.json -> anchor.medians_us; also note non-monotonicity

methodology: single-rank multi-CTA emulation; focal P3 + interferer issued on separate CUDA streams; per-cell median over 25 reps (DEPRECATED — wall-clock timer)
